summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iMGP DBi Managed Futures Strategy ETF (DBMF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund aims to emulate the performance of a group of CTA hedge funds. The funds model allocates weights to derivatives selected by the funds active managers. DBMF was launched on May 8, 2019 and is issued by iM.

data.title: ETF Edge on using managed futures to navigate volatility during the Iran war
data.text: An increase in market volatility is driving ETF innovation around packaging ever-more complex strategies into single instruments. One example is the growth of strategies like managed futures.

data.title: Fidelity is winning ETF revenue-sharing deals after its service fee shook the booming industry
data.text: Fidelity Investments has been winning more revenue-sharing agreements with managers of exchange-traded funds after its fee policy for the booming sector created an industry stir.
